# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Performance and engine sync**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 delivers targeted performance gains and upstream Skia m151 bug fixes. Hot paths in SKColor parsing, SKFourByteTag, HarfBuzzSharp.Tag, and SKShaper glyph reads have been optimized. The release also removes an unnecessary `unsafe` modifier from GRContextOptions and adds ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads for SKColor.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upstream m151 bug fixes merged** — Two rounds of cherry-picked fixes from the Skia chrome/m151 branch improve rendering stability. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382))

## API Surface

- **ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads added to SKColor parsing** — SKColor hex parsing is now faster and allocation-free with new ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context** — The unnecessary `unsafe` modifier on GRContextOptions has been removed, simplifying usage in safe-only projects. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **Performance improvements across hot interop paths** — Per-call char[4] allocations eliminated in HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse; SKShaper glyph results are now read via zero-copy spans. ([#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408), [#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396), [#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))
